design_brief.goal: Establish GreenScape Pro as the premium choice for landscaping services and drive qualified leads from homeowners seeking high-end lawn care, tree work, and garden design
design_brief.audience: Affluent homeowners and property managers who value quality craftsmanship and are willing to pay for premium landscaping services

visual_direction.layout: Spacious, grid-based design with generous whitespace to convey premium positioning and let beautiful landscape photography breathe
visual_direction.typography: Modern sans-serif base with elegant script/cursive accents for key brand elements — use cursive for company name, section dividers, or testimonial quotes to add warmth and craftsmanship feel while keeping body text clean and readable
visual_direction.color_usage: Earth-forward palette with deep greens as primary, warm wood/stone tones as secondary, and bright accent for calls-to-action — avoid oversaturated colors
visual_direction.motion: Subtle parallax scrolling and gentle hover effects that feel organic and natural, avoiding flashy or aggressive animations

content_priorities: Trust signals through portfolio and testimonials
avoid: Generic stock photos of people in hard hats
Corporate blue color schemes that feel cold
Overly busy layouts with multiple CTAs competing
Industry jargon without clear benefit explanations
Overuse of cursive fonts that compromises readability
Script fonts that look unprofessional or overly decorative
